VAL-SHELL-001.evidence: Screenshot landing-page-desktop.png shows hero heading 'Build AI-Powered Tools, Fast', description paragraph, two CTA buttons ('Get Started' linking to /sign-up, 'Sign In' linking to /sign-in), three feature cards, and footer. No blank screen. Console errors: none.

h1 'Build AI-Powered Tools, Fast', paragraph description, 'Get Started' link (/sign-up), 'Sign In' link (/sign-in)
landing-page-desktop.png captured, shows hero + features + footer

VAL-SHELL-002.evidence: Screenshot sign-up-page.png confirms 'Get Started' navigates to /sign-up (renders 'Create an account' form). Screenshot sign-in-page.png confirms 'Sign In' navigates to /sign-in (renders 'Welcome back' form). Both pages render valid content, no 404.

URL changed to http://localhost:3000/sign-in, sign-in form rendered

VAL-SHELL-014.evidence: Screenshot 404-page.png shows '404' heading and 'This page could not be found.' message. curl confirms HTTP 404 status code. Page title includes '404 Not Found'.

h1 '404', h2 'This page could not be found.'

VAL-SHELL-016.evidence: Screenshots at 3 viewports: landing-mobile-375.png (375x812) shows stacked single-column layout with hero, CTA buttons, and vertically stacked feature cards. landing-tablet-768.png (768x1024) shows full layout with 3-column feature cards. landing-desktop-1280.png (1280x800) shows full layout with footer visible. No horizontal overflow at any viewport (verified via JS: scrollWidth <= clientWidth returns true for all 3).

steps.observed: Single-column layout, feature cards stacked, no horizontal scroll
3-column feature cards, centered hero, no horizontal scroll
Full layout with footer, 3-column cards, no horizontal scroll

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. Landing page renders hero, CTA links, and features correctly. Navigation links resolve to valid auth routes. 404 page works for unknown routes. Responsive layout works at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px) with no horizontal overflow.
